summary: Iteration 53: Backend 100% pass (10/10 tests). Tested auto-generate contract API and PDF download. Frontend code review confirms 4-step wizard correctly implemented. Ngrok tunnel infrastructure issue (ERR_NGROK_334) prevents frontend testing.

integration_issues.issue: Expo ngrok tunnel returns ERR_NGROK_334 - 'The endpoint is already online'. External infrastructure issue.

tests: Returns existing contract_id if called twice (idempotency)
Creates reservation with vehicle_id, dates, options, payment_method
Integration test: create reservation -> auto-generate contract -> download PDF

details.step_indicator: Lines 37-75: StepIndicator component with 4 steps (Sélection, Validation, Paiement, Confirmation)
details.step1_selection: Lines 213-316: Dates picker, options selection, price preview
details.step2_validation: Lines 318-398: Full recap - vehicle, dates, options, price breakdown, conditions
details.step3_paiement: Lines 400-451: Payment methods (card, twint, cash) with radio selection
details.step4_confirmation: Lines 453-509: Success message, reservation details, contract download button
details.handleConfirmBooking: Lines 162-205: Creates reservation, calls auto-generate contract, handles cash/card/twint flows
details.handleDownloadContract: Lines 207-211: Opens PDF URL in new window
details.bottom_navigation: Lines 543-585: Précédent/Suivant buttons for steps 1-2, Confirmer on step 3

details.createReservation: Lines 57-67: POST /api/reservations with vehicle_id, dates, options, payment_method
details.initiatePayment: Lines 83-94: POST /api/payments/checkout with reservation_id, origin_url, payment_method_type

critical_code_review_comments: All backend APIs for auto-generate contract feature working correctly
Frontend 4-step wizard code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
handleConfirmBooking correctly sequences: createReservation -> auto-generate contract -> payment handling
Idempotency works: calling auto-generate twice returns same contract_id with 'Contrat déjà généré' message
PDF download returns proper PDF with application/pdf content-type

success_rate.frontend: Unable to verify via browser - ngrok tunnel infrastructure issue (ERR_NGROK_334). Code review confirms correct implementation.

seed_data_creation: Created test reservation (May 2026) with auto-generated contract during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for auto-generate contract all verified working (10/10 tests pass). Frontend code review confirms 4-step booking wizard correctly implemented. Ngrok tunnel has persistent ERR_NGROK_334 infrastructure errors. Contract auto-generation correctly returns existing contract_id when called twice (idempotency).

rca_of_issues.ngrok_tunnel_unavailable: External infrastructure issue - ngrok tunnel returns ERR_NGROK_334 'The endpoint is already online'. This is not a code issue.
